sections.paragraph:
En-Gedi H5872
Called Hazezon-Tamar.
A city allotted to Judah
- General references
Jos 15:62
- Built by the Amorites
Gen 14:7; 2Ch 20:2
- Famous for its vineyards
Son 1:14
Wilderness of, in the vicinity of the Dead Sea
- David uses as a stronghold
1Sa 23:29; 1Sa 24
- Cave of
1Sa 24:3
